Production mass-refit — triptychs

Mask-aware RFI-fixed binning, evidence-selected component counts, nlive=400 · page grows as the 12 fits land · component-vetted per the standing directive before publication

freya · C1D1 · FIRST INTERIOR SCREEN MEASUREMENT

α = 4.357 +0.018/−0.018  |  β = 3.697 +0.013/−0.013  |  τ1GHz = 0.1158 +0.0011/−0.0010 ms  |  χ² C=1.37 D=1.05

Not railed: β sits in the interior, 2.3σ from Kolmogorov (11/3 = 3.667) and ~23σ below the β=4 ceiling — the first genuine screen-index measurement of the campaign, and proof the model family resolves interior β when the data support it (the three railed bursts are burst-specific, not methodology). Component vet: single clean pulse in both bands. The per-channel red/blue strip at the CHIME peak in the residual is unmodeled scintillation amplitude scatter (freya has 607 MHz scintle detections in the 2L table), not a time-domain shape error.

mahi · C1D1

α = 4.164 +0.197/−0.120  |  β = 3.849 +0.109/−0.154  |  τ1GHz = 0.2298 +0.0216/−0.0260 ms  |  χ² C=1.08 D=1.07

Interior but ceiling-adjacent (β=4 at ~1σ+); a genuine two-sided constraint at lower significance than freya — mahi is the faintest-per-pixel burst of the pair (CHIME peak S/N 10/px). Component vet: single component in both bands; the post-peak bumps in the CHIME profile are noise-level at this S/N. Residuals structureless, χ² clean.

zach · PENDING D3-vs-D4 · owner morphology confirmed on our data

Owner ground truth (1 initial + cluster of 3) confirmed at native 32.8 µs resolution: components at +2.06 / +2.52 / +3.01 ms after the initial pulse. The lower panel shows why the count ladder missed it: at the fit's 131 µs auto-binning, c4 merges into c3’s shoulder and only 1+2 resolve. A ladder audit triggered by this catch found the deeper issue: D4 was never launched for any burst — most counts were hand-assigned, never compared to a neighbor. Remedy in flight: zach C2D4 queued (job 102, with a binning-drop fallback if the cluster members degenerate at 131 µs), plus fixed-s2 neighbor count-tests for all multi-component bursts (zach, phineas, whitney, johndoeII) before their TOA entries finalize.

Remaining triptychs land as their fits complete. Companions: model-change brief · PL-PBF validation figures.
